description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of two thick vertical posts and two horizontal rails, all with a rough-hewn, weathered appearance. The wood is depicted with visible grain, knots, and irregularities, giving it a natural, hand-crafted look. The top edges of the rails and posts are uneven and jagged, as if crudely cut or broken, adding to its rugged character. The fence is fastened together with visible dark bolts or nails, reinforcing its sturdy construction. The coloration is a mix of earthy browns and yellows, simulating aged timber exposed to the elements. This type of fence is commonly found in parks, gardens, or as a boundary marker in urban green spaces.
description: A rugged, weathered wooden fence with two vertical posts and two uneven horizontal rails, featuring visible wood grain and dark fasteners. The top edges are jagged, giving it a rustic, hand-crafted appearance.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the narrow thickness of the fence and the layered arrangement of the rails and posts.
description_view_1: A front view displaying the full face of the fence, with two horizontal rails and two vertical posts, highlighting the jagged top edges and visible fasteners.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, similar to view 0, showing the thickness and depth of the wooden components.
description_view_3: A rear view of the fence, showing the back surfaces of the rails and posts, with the same rough, jagged top edges.
